# PhWalls

> Official built-in phone wallpapers in high resolution, without watermarks.

Site: https://www.phwalls.com
Sitemap: https://www.phwalls.com/sitemap.xml
Languages: en, zh, ja, vi, zh-hant
Last-Updated: 2026-03-25
Canonical: https://www.phwalls.com/{lang}/... (language subpaths)
Language-Resolution: user choice stored in localStorage (`phwalls-language`) + `phwalls-lang` cookie, otherwise IP country mapping

---

## About PhWalls

PhWalls is a wallpaper library focused on built-in wallpapers from major phone brands. Collections are organized by brand and release, and wallpapers are offered in full resolution for free download.

---

## Brand Categories

- Samsung: https://www.phwalls.com/samsung
- Xiaomi: https://www.phwalls.com/xiaomi
- Vivo: https://www.phwalls.com/vivo
- OPPO: https://www.phwalls.com/oppo
- Realme: https://www.phwalls.com/realme
- Huawei: https://www.phwalls.com/huawei
- Huawei MatePad: https://www.phwalls.com/huawei%20matepad
- Honor: https://www.phwalls.com/honor
- OnePlus: https://www.phwalls.com/oneplus
- Google Pixel: https://www.phwalls.com/google%20pixel
- Motorola: https://www.phwalls.com/motorola
- Nothing: https://www.phwalls.com/nothing
- HarmonyOS: https://www.phwalls.com/harmonyos
- Infinix: https://www.phwalls.com/transsion%20infinix
- Tecno: https://www.phwalls.com/transsion%20tecno

---

## Key Features

- Official built-in wallpaper collections by brand
- High-resolution downloads without watermarks
- Fast browsing with brand landing pages and detail pages
- Multi-language support: English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Japanese, Vietnamese

---

## Technical Notes

- Brand landing pages follow: https://www.phwalls.com/{brand-type}
- Wallpaper detail pages follow: https://www.phwalls.com/{lang}/wallpapers/{brand-type}/{collection-name}
- Canonical and hreflang are configured for multilingual SEO

---
